data.description:
## What
Write the detailed, committed migration plan for story adult-oxide-slave (bash->Python strangler-fig, Tiers B-E; Tier A closed via rich-glare-sake): per-tier scope, kill-switch design, per-command porting protocol, characterization-gate mechanics, and the concurrency validation matrix (same-clone cross-process lock interop + cross-clone convergence during the dual-impl window).

Files: docs/bash-migration.md (new), docs/architecture.md (pointer so AC #1 of the story is anchored).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] docs/bash-migration.md committed: tier ordering, kill-switch discipline, per-command protocol, validation matrix, soak/exit criteria per tier
- [ ] docs/architecture.md links to the plan (story AC #1 anchor)
- [ ] Lock-interop rule for the Tier D dual window specified (fcntl vs flock(1) vs mkdir fallback)
- [ ] Discovered gaps filed as tickets with discovered_from links
data.title: Document strangler-fig migration plan (docs/bash-migration.md) for adult-oxide-slave
